message:
feat(gui): working terminal window opens on macOS (ft-1memj.3)

- Add bundle-validity guard to toast notifications (fixes NSInternalInconsistencyException
  crash when running outside .app bundle)
- Add env_logger for RUST_LOG-based log output
- GUI binary now starts, creates a 1304x934 window, initializes OpenGL/Metal,
  and renders terminal frames without crashing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,6 +71,7 @@ colorgrad.workspace = true
 dirs-next.workspace = true
 downcast-rs.workspace = true
 emojis.workspace = true
+env_logger.workspace = true
 euclid.workspace = true
 fastrand.workspace = true
 finl_unicode.workspace = true
